title: potentilla decipiens
intro: Potentilla decipiens, also known as creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) with a sprawling habit and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla decipiens are attributed to its ability to help treat various conditions, such as gastrointestinal issues, fever, and skin problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Potentilla decipiens can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
